zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster於1355年8月16日出生在英國肯特艾爾坦 帕拉斯時，她的父親Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence16歲，母親Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster23歲。她於1368年5月1日與Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March在英國波克夏雷亞丁結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1382年1月5日在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克享年26歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster于1355年8月16日出生在英国肯特艾爾坦 帕拉斯时，她的父亲Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence16岁，母亲Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster23岁。她于1368年5月1日与Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March在英国波克夏雷亞丁结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1382年1月5日在爱尔兰庫迪 科克享年26岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Clarence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: apparently from the name of the royal dukedom created in 1362 for Lionel, the third son of Edward III, who had married the heiress of the estate of Clare in Suffolk. It is a conventional rendering in French of the placename, used in parallel with its conventional name in Latin, Clarentia. These names are originally those of a similarly named city founded in the 13th century by the Norman Villehardouin dynasty in the Peloponnese, Greece, whose site is now called Glarentza, and its application to Clare in Suffolk is a kind of toponymic pun. Formally the name is a parallel, based on clarus ‘brilliant, illustrious’, for other auspicious Latin names like Florentia as if ‘flourishing (place)’ and Valentia as if ‘strong, healthy (place)’. The surname may simply have originated as a French habitational name for someone from Clare, but playing on the ducal title, or possibly for a man in one of the early dukes' service.
French: variant of Clarens, a habitational name from a place so named (Hautes-Pyrénées, Gers).

History: The English ducal title Clarence has been created five times, in 1362, 1412, 1461, 1789, and 1890. The first two dukes died without issue; the third forfeited his title before his son was of age, and the title was not inherited. The last two creations were in the modern era. The surname therefore has no direct connection with the male line of any instantiation of the dukedom.

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster was born on 16 August 1355, in Eltham Palace, Kent, England, her father, Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence, was 16 and her mother, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, was 23. She married Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March on 1 May 1368, in Reading, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 5 January 1382, in County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 26, and was buried in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster est née le 16 août 1355, à Eltham Palace, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March le 1 mai 1368, à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 janvier 1382, à County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster am 16. August 1355 in Eltham Palace, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence 16 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster 23. Sie hat am 1. Mai 1368 in Reading, Berkshire, England Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Januar 1382 im Alter von 26 Jahren in County Cork, Irland und wurde in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster è nata il il 16 agosto 1355 nel Eltham Palace, Kent, England, sua padre, Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March il 1 maggio 1368, nel Reading, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 gennaio 1382, nel County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolta a Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulsterが1355年8月16日にイギリスケントエルサム プアレイスで生まれた時，父Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarenceは16歳，母Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulsterは23歳であった。1368年5月1日にイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングでEdmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of Marchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1382年1月5日にアイルランドコウントイ コルクで26歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーウィグモー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster(이)가 1355년 8월 16일 영국 켄트 엘섬 팔레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1368년 5월 1일 영국 버크실르 리딩에서 Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1382년 1월 5일 아일랜드 카운티 코르크에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 위그모어 애브브이에 묻혔다.

mn.16 August 1355–5 January 1382: 1355 оны Наймдугаар сарын 16–1382 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 5

pt.16 August 1355–5 January 1382: 16 de agosto de 1355–5 de janeiro de 1382
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster nasceu em 16 de agosto de 1355, em Eltham Palace, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March em 1 de maio de 1368, em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1382, em County Cork, Irlanda, com 26 anos, e foi sepultada em Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster родилась 16 августа 1355 г. в местности элтам палеис, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March 1 мая 1368 г. в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 5 января 1382 г. в местности коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности вигмор эбби, вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.16 August 1355–5 January 1382: 16 de agosto de 1355–5 de enero de 1382
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster nació el 16 de agosto de 1355, en Eltham Palace, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Lionel of Antwerp 1st Duke of Clarence, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March el 1 de mayo de 1368, en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de enero de 1382, en County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultada en Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
